body: WAL prototype is working in local dev. Starting integration with the dispatch loop this sprint. ETA for review-ready: June 18.
Heads up - WAL file path is hardcoded in the prototype. Should be configurable via env var before review.
Good catch - will make it configurable. Adding NANOQUEUE_WAL_PATH env var.
Reproduced at 520 msg/s in staging load test. Adding mutex hold duration metric to isolate the window. PR up by EOD.
PR #618 is up. Fixed by moving offset commit inside the mutex hold. Load test now clean at 800 msg/s. Requesting review.
Reviewing now. Looks clean. One nit: the mutex name in the log line says old name. Minor but confusing. Otherwise LGTM.
PR #601 merged. GET /health now returns 503 with a dependency_status object when Redis ping fails. Staging green.
PR #598 merged. event-router now exposes /metrics on :9102. Grafana dashboard updated with routed_events_total panel.
Dashboard looks great. The queue_depth counter is especially useful for autoscaling decisions. Nice work.
Redis token store is working. Sessions survive pod restart now. Added TTL config via NANOQUEUE_TOKEN_TTL_SECONDS. Starting review.
Root cause: routing rule loader in 3.3 expects `rules[]` array but 3.2 configmap used `routing_rules[]`. Migration script missing. Writing fix now.
Blocked on whether we add a migration job or a backwards-compatible loader. @daniel.roth can you weigh in?
Do backwards-compatible loader - read both key names, prefer `rules[]` if present. Simpler than a migration job and safe for staged rollout.
Found it. Schema inference in ingestor/parser.go line 214 hits a type assertion panic when it encounters []interface{} in a nested field. Working on fix.
Fix branch is data-50-nested-array-fix. Tests pass locally for Kubernetes event logs and application logs with nested tags arrays. PR up tomorrow.
Compactor and retention config PR merged. Staging loki volume stopped growing. Will monitor production over next 48h then apply.
Production retention applied. Volume down 40% from peak. Closing.
ApplicationSets generator deployed. All three environments (staging, production, roth-sandbox) now managed from a single template. Spot-checked ArgoCD UI - all apps synced.
node-worker-6 taint applied: NoSchedule. Reviewing kubelet logs now - /var/lib/containerd at 98% capacity. Likely containerd image cache growth.
Ran crictl rmi --prune on node-worker-6. Freed 40GB. Re-watching disk usage. If stable by EOD tomorrow will remove taint.
ExternalSecret resources deployed for DB creds and OAuth client secrets. All pods picking up secrets from AWS SM now. Manual Secret manifests deleted from repo.
